description: Retrieves a list of issues in a specified GitHub repository. You must provide the repository owner username and repository name. Optionally, you may include state, labels, assignee, and search terms to filter the returned issues.

owner.description: A string containing the GitHub repository owner username or organization name.

repo.description: A string containing the repository name where issues should be listed.

state.description: The issue state to filter by. Use open, closed, or all.
